comments.text: Maybe it makes sense to clarify that this problem is referring to positive integers. Otherwise, my colleague Andrew Xue has produced a trivial example with GPT 5.2 Pro: https://chatgpt.com/share/696d32e2-67bc-8009-8427-033925e906aa

As commented elsewhere, I have generally left it implicit whether 'integer' should denote all integers, strictly positive integers, or non-negative integers, as this is usually clear from context (e.g. in multiplicative number theory problems such as this the restriction $x,y\geq 1$ is obvious).

In view of the many AI bots now scraping the site for quick wins, it may be worthwhile to make these "clear from context" hypotheses more explicit in the statement (although in this case the Lean formalization is stating the problem as intended).
